benefits.description: Added to bioidentical HRT and thyroid medication for comprehensive symptom resolution

protocol_notes: Using injectable estrogen and testosterone twice weekly, oral progesterone daily, and thyroid medication. Emphasizes that peptides are not a replacement for hormones for menopause symptom resolution. Recommends telemedicine clinics: Wittmer Rejuvenation, Aspire Rejuvenation, Defy Medical, Matrix Hormones, and Elevate MD.
